title: 名侦探柯南红黑阵营数据集 / Detective Conan Faction Dataset
description: 名侦探柯南红黑阵营可视化工具的完整数据集定义，包含角色、事件、情感关系、集数映射和剧情篇章。

metadata.description: 数据集元信息 / Dataset metadata

version.description: 数据集版本号 / Dataset version (semver format)

lastUpdated.description: 最后更新日期 / Last updated date (YYYY-MM-DD format)

totalEpisodes.description: 动画总集数 / Total anime episodes

totalChapters.description: 漫画总话数 / Total manga chapters

totalCharacters.description: 角色总数 / Total number of characters

characterEvents.description: 角色事件列表 / Character event list

relationships.description: 情感关系列表 / Romantic relationship list

relationshipEvents.description: 关系事件列表 / Relationship event list

episodeChapterMappings.description: 集数-话数映射列表（含发行日期） / Episode-chapter mapping list with publication dates

storyArcs.description: 剧情篇章列表 / Story arc list

AppearanceCount.description: 出场/提及次数，用于衡量角色重要性 / Appearance and mention counts for importance ranking

episodeCount.description: 出场次数 / Number of episode appearances

mentionCount.description: 被提及次数 / Number of mentions by other characters

DualIdentityInfo.description: 双重身份信息（卧底角色在另一阵营的身份） / Dual identity info for undercover characters

secondaryName.description: 在另一阵营使用的姓名 / Name used in secondary faction

secondaryCodename.description: 在另一阵营使用的代号 / Codename used in secondary faction

Character.description: 角色基本信息 / Character basic information

id.description: 角色唯一标识符 / Unique character identifier

nameEn.description: 角色英文名（wiki标准） / Character English name (wiki standard)

codename.description: 角色代号（如 Gin、Vodka，无代号时为 null） / Character codename (null if none)

faction.description: 主要所属阵营：RED=正义方，BLACK=黑衣组织 / Primary faction: RED=Justice, BLACK=Black Organization

subFaction.description: 阵营子分类（FBI、CIA、PSB、DETECTIVE、POLICE、DETECTIVE_BOYS、BO_CORE、BO_OUTER 等） / Sub-faction category

avatar.description: 头像标识（文件名或 URL） / Avatar identifier (filename or URL)

appearanceCount.description: 出场/提及次数 / Appearance and mention counts

isDualIdentity.description: 是否拥有双重身份（如卧底） / Whether character has dual identity (e.g. undercover)

dualIdentityInfo.description: 双重身份详细信息（仅当 isDualIdentity 为 true 时有效） / Dual identity details (only when isDualIdentity is true)

CharacterEvent.description: 角色事件，记录角色状态变化 / Character event recording status changes

id.description: 事件唯一标识符 / Unique event identifier

characterId.description: 关联角色 ID / Associated character ID

type.description: 事件类型：JOIN=加入，LEAVE=离开，DEATH=牺牲，EXPOSED=身份暴露，DEFECT=叛变 / Event type

episodeIndex.description: 关联动画集数 / Associated anime episode index

chapterIndex.description: 关联漫画话数 / Associated manga chapter index

description.description: 事件描述（中文） / Event description (Chinese)

RomanticRelationship.description: 情感关系，记录两个角色之间的情感联系 / Romantic relationship between two characters

id.description: 关系唯一标识符 / Unique relationship identifier

character1Id.description: 关系中第一个角色的 ID / First character ID in relationship

character2Id.description: 关系中第二个角色的 ID / Second character ID in relationship

type.description: 关系类型：LOVE=恋爱，CRUSH=暗恋，CHILDHOOD_SWEETHEART=青梅竹马，MARRIED=已婚，AMBIGUOUS=暧昧 / Relationship type

initialStatus.description: 初始关系状态：UNCONFESSED=未表白，CONFESSED=已表白，DATING=交往中，CONFIRMED=已确认，SEPARATED=已分离 / Initial relationship status

RelationshipEvent.description: 关系事件，记录情感关系状态变化 / Relationship event recording status changes

id.description: 事件唯一标识符 / Unique event identifier

relationshipId.description: 关联关系 ID / Associated relationship ID

episodeIndex.description: 关联动画集数 / Associated anime episode index

chapterIndex.description: 关联漫画话数 / Associated manga chapter index

newStatus.description: 变更后的关系状态 / New relationship status after change

description.description: 事件描述（如'工藤新一向毛利兰表白——伦敦篇'） / Event description

EpisodeChapterMapping.description: 集数-话数映射，含漫画发行日期 / Episode-chapter mapping with publication date

episodeIndex.description: 动画集数编号 / Anime episode index

chapterIndex.description: 漫画话数编号 / Manga chapter index

publicationDate.description: 漫画发行日期（YYYY-MM 格式） / Manga publication date (YYYY-MM format)

StoryArc.description: 剧情篇章，柯南中的重大剧情篇章 / Story arc, major plot arcs in Detective Conan

id.description: 篇章唯一标识符 / Unique arc identifier

name.description: 篇章名称（如'波本篇'） / Arc name

description.description: 篇章简要描述 / Arc brief description

startEpisodeIndex.description: 起始动画集数 / Starting anime episode index

startChapterIndex.description: 起始漫画话数 / Starting manga chapter index

endEpisodeIndex.description: 结束动画集数（可选，进行中的篇章无结束） / Ending anime episode index (optional)

endChapterIndex.description: 结束漫画话数（可选） / Ending manga chapter index (optional)
